## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (existing behavior changes)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI/CD change
- [ ] Infrastructure (dependencies, build system, etc.)

## Verification

- [ ] Build passes: `./build.sh` completes successfully
- [ ] No CI-specific code added to `build.sh`
- [ ] PoC upstream build workflow still valid
- [ ] All lint checks pass (if applicable)

## Upstream Compatibility

- [ ] Change does NOT modify files in `upstream/` (read-only)
- [ ] Change is compatible with upstream commit `33bbc02`
